title: nepeta hindostana var. woodrowii
intro: Nepeta hindostana var. woodrowii, also known as Himalayan Catmint, is a fragrant and flowering plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Himalayan Catmint include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and acting as an antiseptic to heal wounds. In herbal preparations, Nepeta hindostana var. woodrowii is commonly used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
